title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable**
*2026*
The beloved solo/co-op card-crafting game, now with Dungeon Crawler Carl!
![Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_d9f2c663.png)

2. **Excursions**
*2027*
Carefully plan itineraries to thrill guests on out-of-this-world vacations.
![Excursions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_65654251.jpg)

3. **Lairs**
*2026*
Build a devious dungeon and explore your rival's creation. 
![Lairs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_634d5b49.jpg)

4. **Unstoppable**
*2025*
Gather your allies and sharpen your skills, for the darkest days are yet to come.
![Unstoppable](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_7a2f5213.jpg)

5. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_888f49cf.png)

6. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_5edc899a.png)

7. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_4a8cc286.jpg)

8. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_99ad9d60.png)

9. **Onward**
*2025*
Draft champions, slay monsters, and rally minions to destroy the enemy Nexus.
![Onward](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_725475db.jpg)

10. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_e866464f.jpg)

11. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_f3b20421.jpg)

12. **Yotei**
*2025*
A Machi building game of forest, mountains, and potatoes.
![Yotei](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_aa69e1be.png)

13. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_d9d09e5b.jpg)

14. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_0b2d1e33.png)

15. **Diplomacy: The Golden Blade**
*2026*
Strategy, negotiation and backstabbing in 15 minutes per player!
![Diplomacy: The Golden Blade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_10988b2f.jpg)

16. **Galactic Cruise**
*2025*
Build and launch ships to send guests on luxurious space vacations.
![Galactic Cruise](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_3918b3a2.jpg)

17. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_b0d52a1a.jpg)

18. **Barrage: Earned Authority**
*2026*
Sixteen innovative community-driven Executive Officers.
![Barrage: Earned Authority](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_a4ca304f.png)

19. **20 Strong**
*2023*
A modular solo adventure system featuring 20 dice integrated in unique ways.
![20 Strong](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_69d6cdce.png)

20. **Nemesis: Retaliation**
*2025*
Highly trained marines enter an alien nest with strict orders and advanced tools.
![Nemesis: Retaliation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_92d27731.jpg)

21. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_813e3127.jpg)

22. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_dbc48571.jpg)

23. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_46c56d06.jpg)

24. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_36d2261c.jpg)

25. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_fe56efbd.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_43637ac6.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_25ba8c47.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_738d20aa.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_e9782a44.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_b945b6e5.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_5c284259.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**

8. **Azul**

9. **Terraforming Mars**
*114 months on the list*

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_90e3a5cd.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_944b0b06.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_a8d01c93.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_cd82166d.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_d628ef0d.jpg)

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_edc9ef26.png)

16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_d589dc87.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*2 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_9e5d7c98.jpg)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_64182a0f.png)

19. **The Gang**
*9 months on the list*

![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_1760788c.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*9 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.

21. **The White Castle**
*29 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_34427fd5.jpg)

22. **Carcassonne**
*273 months on the list*

*2 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_2faf98ab.jpg)

24. **Brass: Birmingham**
*16 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_9c7f999a.jpg)

25. **Splendor**
*143 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-21/toplist/bgg_0e22d284.jpg)
